testcase.name: test_generate_penalty_within_grace

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (100.0 == 0 or 'grace' in 'penalty invoice created' or 'within' in 'penalty invoice created') + where 100.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8e4f5ef5900>('total_penalty', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8e4f5ef5900> = {'invoice': {'amount_paid': 0, 'balance': 100.0, 'branch_id': 'da114e26-fd00-467f-8728-6b8047a244b5', 'cashier_id': '51b8c10a-eeab-4682-9554-a446b0698e05', ...}, 'invoice_number': 'PEN-20260220-0003', 'message': 'Penalty invoice created', 'total_penalty': 100.0}.get + and 'penalty invoice created' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf8e4f6039a70>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf8e4f6039a70> = 'Penalty invoice created'.lower + where 'Penalty invoice created' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8e4f5ef5900>('message', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8e4f5ef5900> = {'invoice': {'amount_paid': 0, 'balance': 100.0, 'branch_id': 'da114e26-fd00-467f-8728-6b8047a244b5', 'cashier_id': '51b8c10a-eeab-4682-9554-a446b0698e05', ...}, 'invoice_number': 'PEN-20260220-0003', 'message': 'Penalty invoice created', 'total_penalty': 100.0}.get + and 'penalty invoice created' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf8e4f6039a70>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf8e4f6039a70> = 'Penalty invoice created'.lower + where 'Penalty invoice created' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8e4f5ef5900>('message', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8e4f5ef5900> = {'invoice': {'amount_paid': 0, 'balance': 100.0, 'branch_id': 'da114e26-fd00-467f-8728-6b8047a244b5', 'cashier_id': '51b8c10a-eeab-4682-9554-a446b0698e05', ...}, 'invoice_number': 'PEN-20260220-0003', 'message': 'Penalty invoice created', 'total_penalty': 100.0}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_qb_payments.py:268: in test_generate_penalty_within_grace assert result.get("total_penalty", 0) == 0 or "grace" in result.get("message", "").lower() or "within" in
